sn1.13:1.0.1: At Sāvatthī. Standing to one side, that devata spoke this verse in the presence of the Blessed One:
sn1.13:1.0.2: v.24"There is no affection like that for a son,No wealth equal to cattle,There is no light like the sun,Among the waters the ocean is supreme."
sn1.13:1.0.3: v.25"There is no affection like that for oneself,No wealth equal to grain,There is no light like wisdom,Among the waters the rain is supreme."
